scope: Cycle 17: Bug hunt C16 (merlin_llm_adapter.gd + llm_adapter_prompts.gd) + BUGFIX-027/028 + feat few-shot JSON GM examples

bugs_found.description: C16 phantom commit: echo_memory LLM wiring NEVER PUSHED. Commit 6e1c35f only contained status JSONs. build_narrative_context() was missing echo_memory, tension_zone, convergence_zone, total_runs. build_context_enrichment() had no echo memory or MOS zone formatting. Same pattern as C8/C9 (code lost, only status committed).
bugs_found.fix: Added echo_memory/tension_zone/convergence_zone/total_runs to build_narrative_context() return dict. Added cross-run death memory, faction history, veteran status, and MOS convergence hints to build_context_enrichment(). LLM now receives full cross-run context for narrative callbacks.

bugs_found.description: build_narrative_user_prompt() defaulted life_essence to 5 instead of 100. If context was missing life data, LLM would generate urgent survival scenarios incorrectly.

overall_assessment: Cycle 17: Bug hunt C16 found phantom commit (3rd occurrence). 2 bugs fixed (1 HIGH + 1 LOW). 1 feature (few-shot JSON examples). 28 total bugs fixed across 17 cycles.
